author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UKING David Muvhengo ongomunye wabadidiyeli bomdlalo Uzalo, useveze ukuthi uthando olulokhu lukhonjiswe ababukeli balo mdlalo, abaqala kudala ukuwulandela, yilona olubagqugquzela ukuthi benze umsebenzi oncomekayo. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi lo mdlalo umemezela abalingisi abasha, abazoba yingxenye yawo kusuka kule nyanga. Kubalingisi abakhona kubalwa asebezakhele igama ekulingiseni okukhona kubo uThulani Mtsweni ozolingisa indawo kaPondo, Nduduzo Zuma (Smiso), Phindile Mashabane (LaDlamini) noSikhosiphi Ngcobo (Bab’Sizwe). UMukwevho uthe laba balingisi bazofike bangene khaxa kuzona zonke izindaba ezenzeka KwaMashu, kule sizini yesibili esanda kuqala. "Bazofika benze lo mdlalo uye phambili, ezintweni ezenzekayo kuwona manje. Kule sizini esanda kuqala ababukeli bangalindela izinto ezizobashiya bebambe ongezansi kodwa ezizokwenza ukuthi abantu abaningi baqhubeke nokuwujabulela  futhi bahlale beseduzane nawo," kusho uMukwevho. Uthe bayaqhubeka nokumema bonke abalandeli bawo abasuka kude nawo, ukuthi baqhubeke nokuwuthakasela njengoba kuyibona abababeke lapho bekhona. "Siyathembisa ukuthi ngeke size sibaphoxe, uthando, uxhaso ababukeli abasikhombise lona lwenza siqhubeke nokwenza lo mdlalo njengoba manje sikwisizini ka-12, esizibophezele ukuthi siqhubeke silethe lokhu abakufunayo, nokuzobajabulisa," kusho yena. U-Ofentse Thinane, obhekelele izinhlelo zakuleli kwiSABC, uthe babemukela ngemfudumalo abalingisi abasha kulo mdlalo, wathi abakubhekile abazokuletha ezindaweni abazilingisayo nobudlelwane abazoba nabo nozakwabo. UNduduzo Zuma, uqale ukubonakala kulo mdlalo ngenyanga edlule, uPhindile Mashabane yena uqale ukubonakala ngoLwesithathu, uSikhosiphi Ngcobo uzoqala ukubonakala namhlanje kuthi uThulani Mtsweni aqale ukubonakala ngo-Ephreli 24.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: USWAZI Simelane oseveze ukuthi uphelile umshado wakhe noVJ Xaba  njengoba bebebonakala ohlelweni, i-Being A Xaba kuMzansi Magic njalo ngeSonto BAMNCOMILE ngesinqumo sokuqeda ngomshado wakhe noJabulani Xaba, odume ngelikaVJ,  uSwazi Simelane, obengomunye wabebevela ohlelweni i-Being A Xaba, obelukhonjiswa njalo ngeSonto ngo-7 ebusuku, kuMzansi Magic. Kulolu hlelo olufinyelele emaphethelweni ngeSonto, unkosikazi kaVJ, uSwazi, ubhale enkundleni iTikTok ukuthi ukuba kulolu hlelo kube uhambo alujabulele, futhi wabonga ababukeli balo ngokubamukela emindenini yabo. "Siyabonga kakhulu bantu bakithi ngokusibukela, kube uhambo obelwehla lwenyukela kodwa siyabonga mina nezingane zami," kubhala uSwazi. Omunye wabalandeli bakhe, ube esemncoma ngokwenzeke esiqeshini sokugcina lapho abekhuluma khona nomyeni ethi akalalele izingane zakhe uma zikhuluma naye. Kodwa kuleyo nkulumo uSwazi uveze izindaba ezishaqisayo zokuthi useshiyile ekubeni umakoti kulo mndeni. "Ngiyabonga kakhulu sithandwa sami, angiseyona ingxenye yaKwaXaba uhambo lwami noNonkosi selufike ekugcineni," kusho uSwazi. Abanye bamncomile uSwazi besho ukuthi ngesinqumo asithathile uzibeke yena phambili. ULondiwe Shangase uthe:"Kodwa ngabe ngingumuntu omubi ngokungamjabuleli ngesinqumo asithathile". UBucie uthe:"Ayikho into enhle njengokubona umuntu wesifazane ezikhetha yena, zikhethe wena njalo sisi siyakuthanda kukukhanyele mama". UNozipho Zeeh uthe:"Sisi ufikile, sakubona kodwa le ibingengangawe. Ngiyajabula ukubona ukuthi uzikhethe wena, ufanelwe okungcono wena nezingane zakho, nazo zidinga umama onothando nonokuthula ngoba ngeke Sisi yoooooh". Ababukeli balolu hlelo bake baveza seluphakathi, ukuthi iyadumaza indlela uXaba anesandla esiqinile ngayo ezinganeni, nakuye umkakhe ngezinye izikhathi. Baveza imizwa yokuthi akabalaleli abanye abantu, ufuna kuzwiwe ngaye. Ngenxa yesasasa yalolu hlelo iziqephu zalo kwakumele ziphele uma sekukhonjiswe ezingu-13 kuphela kodwa zanyuswa ngenxa yokuthandwa kohlelo.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULI uSabelo Ngema ovivela ukugijima iComrades Marathon okokuqala ngoJuni UMCULI oyilungu leqembu i-Afrosoul ufuna ukugqugquzela ozakwabo ngokubaluleka kokuzivocavoca ukuze bagweme izifo. Uzokwenza lokhu ngokugijima iComrades Marathon okokuqala ngoJuni 14 nonyaka. USabelo Ngema uzoba ngomunye wezinkulungwane zabagijimi ezizosuka eThekwini, zilibangise eMgungundlovu, kulo mjaho ozoba ngoka-99 kulo nyaka. Lo mculi uzobe engaqali ukusebenzisa ukugijima ukuqwashisa abantu ngokubaluleka kokunakekela impilo njengoba ngonyaka odlule, yena nozakwabo bagijime besuka eThekwini baya ePort Edward, befundisa ngezifo zengqondo. “UNkulunkulu usidale ngendlela yokuthi akukho okungasihlula ukukwenza. Ngathi uma ngibona umkhulu omdala eqeda iComrades ngonyaka odlule, ngazitshela ukuthi nami ngifuna ukuzophonsela inselelo yokuthi ngiyiqede. Sengiwagijimile ama-marathon (42.2km), ngase ngithi ake ngizwe iComrades,” kusho uSabelo. Uthe ukugijima kuyamsiza empilweni nasemqondweni ngoba uyakhohlwa yizinkinga uma esemgwaqweni. “Uthi uma ugijima amabanga amade ubuye usuwakhe isitezi ngomqondo, usuthenge nezimoto. Ubuya namaqhinga amasha okuzithuthukisa, yingakho ngikuyamanisa kakhulu nezifo zengqondo ngoba ukhwantalala nengcindezi kuyaphela,” kusho yena. Uthe nasekhaya isimo siba ngcono uma ujima ngoba ukhwantalala nengcindezi, kusuke kuphansi. “Kuthina esiganelwe, ekhaya kumnandi. Umama uhlala ehleka futhi upheka kahle. Uma uyindoda uhlala ujabule, ungakhathazeki nangokuhamba imitholampilo yamadoda ngoba uba wuqanduqandu. Lokho ngezinye zezinto ezinhle ezenziwa ukujima ngoba umndeni uyabumbana,” kusho uSabelo oshadelwe wuzakwabo acula naye eqenjini, uThandeka Zulu. Uthe ugqugquzelwa kakhulu umculi we-kwaito ophinde abe wumfundisi, uKabelo Mabalane, osegijime iComrades izikhawu eziningi. Uqhube wathi baningi abanye njengoDJ Sndara, naye oseke wayigijima iComrades Marathon phambili. “Ngiyabasifela abafowethu esinabo emkhakheni wezokungcebeleka ukuthi bakujwayele ukuzivocavoca futhi behlise nasezinkanjini zikaFaro. Ngiyazi ukuthi ngizozwakala njengomuntu ozenza ngcono kodwa asisebenzise uphuzo njengento yenjabulo ngaleso sikhathi, hhayi ukuthi silusebenzise ngokweqile ngoba luzohlukumeza imizimba yethu. Asijimeni. Buka ubaba uHhashi Elimhlophe ukuthi uma esesteji, udlula izintwana ezincane.” Uthe ngokujima yena usehlale enomfutho singabi khona nesidingo sokusebenzisa izikhuthazi nokusiza impilo yakhe. “Ngiyakhumbula eminyakeni edlule uL’vovo ngesikhathi ewa esteji, ngaba ngomunye wabokuqala engaya ukuyomsiza. Ngiyambona manje ukuthi uyajima, okuyinto engikhuthazayo nami nengifisa ngathi bakhona nabanye abangafunda kuyo.” Uphethe ngokuveza ukuthi uzoqala amaqoqo okugijima ngalapho ehlala khona, eReservoir Hills ngenhloso yokukhuthaza nabanye.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: USDUDUZO Mavundla olahlwe yicala lokuzama ukubulala indodana kamfowabo SIMGCULISILE isigwebo sikadilikajele esinikwe umfowabo, owesilisa waseChesterville, eThekwini, kulandela ukulahlwa yicala lokuzama ukubulala indodana yakhe ngoba ethi uyamyala. USduduzo Mavundla (29), ugixabezwe ngodilikajele yiNkantolo yesiFunda saseThekwini ngoMsombuluko, elahlwa yicala lokuzama ukubulala uMpendulo Msweli, owayeneminyaka eyisishiyagalolunye ngesikhathi kwenzeka isigameko ngoJanuwari 2024. Uyise kaMpendulo, uMnuz Simingezwilenkosi Mavundla, uthe simjabulisile isigwebo, wathi unethemba lokuthi sizoyijabulisa nendodana yakhe. “Sesizoke sihambe sikhululeke, lungekho uvalo lokuthi kungaphinde kwenzeke ishwa, ayenzakalise isibili indodana yami. Sikhululwa wukuthi okungenani, njengoba evalelwe nje, uyophuma ejele ingane yami isikhulile,” kusho uMavundla. Ngosuku lwesigameko kuthiwa olahlwe yicala wayenga umgilwa, owayefike ngokuvakasha kubo kayise eChesterville, wathi abaye esitolo ayomthengela ama-chips. Kuthiwa wagcina ezibuyela yedwa emva kwesikhathi umgilwa engekho, kwathi uma ebuzwa ngaye, wathi yena umnike u-R2 ukuthi ayozithengela ama-chips esitolo, yena waqhubeka nenye indlela. Kuthiwa umgilwa wacingwa yonke indawo, engatholakali, kwaze kwabikelwa amaphoyisa. Kuvela ukuthi watholwa esesesibhedlela iVictoria Mxenge (King Edward), enenkebenkebe yengozi ebusweni. Kwavela ukuthi uSduduzo, owayekade esiza ngesikhathi kucingwa umgilwa nawo wonke umuntu, wuye owayemyengele ehlathini, lapho afika khona wamlimaza ngesikhali esithize, wamshiya ezitshela ukuthi ufile. Kuthiwa umgilwa waphaphama sekuhwalele, wagaqa, waze wayofika emgwaqweni okuyilapho athathwa khona abantu angabazi, bamphuthumisa esibhedlela. Zabe sezimkhalela ummangalelwa, umgilwa etshela amaphoyisa nezihlobo ukuthi uSduduzo omlimazile, ngelithi ufuna ukufundisa uyise isifundo. Emva kokugwetshwa kukaSduduzo, uyise kamgilwa utshele Isolezwe ukuthi umfowabo wayethi uzwisa yena ubuhlungu ngokuzama ukubulala indodana yakhe kwazise wayemkweleta imali. Uveze ukuthi yayila ku-R32 000 imali ayemkweleta yona umfowabo emalini eyayinguR61 000 ayemboleke yona ngasekuqaleni kuka-2022. “Wayephunyelwe yimali yesibili, kulandela ukushona kukanina ngo-2014. Sakhuluma, savumelana ngokuthi angiboleke uR50 000, engangizogcwalisela phezu kwawo ngithenge imoto yokwenza umsebenzi we-Uber. Wagcina engiboleka uR61 000, okwathi emva kokungifakela ebhange, washintsha, watshela umndeni ukuthi ngimphuzise uphuzo oludakayo, ngase ngintshontsha imali yakhe,” kusho uMavundla. Uthe ngokudinwa yisenzo sikamfowabo, wagcina eyisebenzisa budlabha imali, wangabe esayithenga imoto ayethi uzoyithenga. Uveze ukuthi umfowabo wagcina eya ebhange eyosho ukuthi imali engene ebhange likamfowabo, isuka kwelakhe yebiwe. Ibhange lakhetha ukuyivala, yangakwazi ukuphuma, kodwa futhi langayibuyisela kumnikazi. Uqhube wathi yayikuR35 000 imali agcina eyisebenzisa budlabha kuR61 000 ayewubolekiwe. Uveze ukuthi emva kwemihlangano embalwa yomndeni lapho okwakuzanywa khona ukuthi kulungiswe udaba babuyisane, bagcina beya emaphoyiseni beyofuna izincwadi ezifungelwe abazihambisa ebhange, ukuze lidedele imali engu-R26 500 eyayivalelekile. “Kwathi uma liyidedela ibhange, ngambuyisela uR20 000, engagcina ngithola ukuthi wasebenzisa uR15 000 wawo ukungithengela izinkabi ezazizongibulala,” kusho uMavundla, othe wasinda emlonyeni wengwenya ngokuthi angalubhadi eNanda lapho uSduduzo ayemyengela khona ophathe. Uthe yaqhubeka yabanjwa eminye imihlangano yomndeni ukuzama ukuza nesixazululo ngoba  kwakubonakala ukuthi isimo siyaphuma endleleni kulandela ukuthi uSduduzo esedubele emotweni yomuntu ekhokhelwa ngebanga elihambile, uMavundla ayehamba ngayo. Uqhube wathi kwase kuvunyelwenwe ngokuthi ngoJanuwari 2024, uzoqala ayikhokhe kancane kancane aze ayiqede, okwagcina kungasenzekanga, uSduduzo esezama ukubulala umgilwa. Uthe yize ayemazi uSduduzo ukuthi unenhliziyo embi, kodwa wayengakaze akhombise ukuthi indodana yakhe uyicabangela okubi. “Wayeyithanda ngale ndlela, kungekho okusolisayo ukuthi uzoyenzakalisa,” kusho uMavundla, othe ugculiseke kakhulu ngesigwebo ikakhulukazi ngoba wayezitshela ukuthi uzonikwa iminyaka eyisishiyagalombili kuya kweyishumi, ngokusho kwesisebenzi sasenkantolo athe sasibasayinisa iphepha elithize. USduduzo ugwetshwa nje, wabanjwa ngoDisemba 2025 eNorth West, emva kokubalekela ingalo yomthetho ngaboJuni 2024, kulandela ukudedelwa kwakhe ngebheyili. Isolezwe labhala udaba ngokuthi amaphoyisa ayamfuna, udaba lwafundwa yiphoyisa laseNorth West elalingumakhelwane wakhe, lathinta umphenyi waseCato Manor, lasho ukuthi: “Nangu la endaweni yokucima ukoma, uphuza utshwala, ubuka nebhola,” kwaba wukubanjwa kwakhe.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Ayanda Ndamane / Independent Newspapers KWEMBULWE izipoki ezibhubhudla imali esikhwameni esixhasa izitshudeni ngemali yokufunda ezikhungweni zemfundo, i-National Students' Financial Aid Scheme (NSFAS), ekubeni kuvela ukuthi sezafa. Lezi zipoki zivundululwe embikweni kaMcwaningi Mabhuku Jikelele, oveze ukuthi zingu-822 izipoki okutholakale ukuthi ziyahlomula kulesi sikhwama, ekubeni ulwazi lwaseMnyangweni wezaseKhaya, luveza ukuthi zendela koyisemkhulu. UNgqongqoshe weMfundo ePhakeme, uMnuz Buti Manamela, useyalele abalesi sikhwama ukuthi baqale uphenyo. Uthe kumele basebenzisane nophiko oluphenya amacala enkohlakalo, i-SIU ukuze kutholakale abenza lo mkhonyovu. "Umbiko uveza ukuthi lezi zipoki ziyaqhubeka nokuxhaswa yi-NSFAS ekubeni zingaphili ngokoMnyango wezaseKhaya. Asifuni ngomuso kube nento efuze le yingakho kumele kuphenywe." Uthe lo mbiko ubuye waveza ukuthi kunezitshudeni ezevile ku-14 000, ezihlomula oxhasweni ngendlela engafanele. "Imindeni yalezi zitshudeni ihola imali engaphezu kwebekiwe ukuze uxhaswe. Kodwa nazo ziyaqhubeka nokuhlomula ngendlela engafanele." Uthe kuphinde kwatholwa nezitshudeni ezingu-321, ezihlomulayo ekubeni zihlomula nasesibonelelweni sabangasebenzi kuleli, esingu-R370 ngenyanga. "Konke lokhu uhlelo lwe-NSFAS luhlulekile ukukubika ukuthi kunezitshudeni ezithola uxhaso kungafanele. Okunye kunabaxhasiwe ekubeni bafeyila, ekubeni umgomo we-NSFAS uthi uma ufeyila uphucwa uxhaso." Uthe imali ye-NSFAS ihlinzekwa abadonsa kanzima, hhayi uwonke wonke ongamele ayithole. "Sifuna ukuqeda nya ngenkohlakalo nokudliwa kungafanele kwemali yabakhokhi bentela kuleli. Sethemba ukuthi uphenyo luzothola yonke into, sazi ukuthi ubani owenzeni." Uthe asikho isitshudeni esixhaswe ngendlela efanele okumele sitatazele ngenxa yalolu phenyo. Uqhube wathi bafuna ukubamba labo abaqamba amanga, abaletha ulwazi olungelona ngesikhathi befaka izicelo zoxhaso.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMNUZ Sfiso Meyiwa usole uLongwe Twala ngokuqhuba intwala ngewisa UMFOWABO kaSenzo Meyiwa ongasekho, uMnuz Sfiso Meyiwa, usole uLongwe Twala ngokuqhuba intwala ngewisa, kulandela ukuvumbuka kweheheba le ncwadi okuthiwa ulibhalele unina kamufi. Kule ncwadi - uLongwe oziqhelelanisayo necala - unxusa unina kaMeyiwa, uNkk Ntombifuthi Meyiwa, ukuthi acele ukulaleliswa inkulumo eqoshiwe, okuthiwa ummangalelwa wesibili, uBongani Ntanzi, wagonyuluka kuyo ngokubulala umufi. Kuyona, uLongwe unxusa uNkk Meyiwa ukuthi angavumi ukuthi ayilalele yedwa inkulumo kodwa akobiza abantu abathenjiwe njengoLieutenant-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi kanjalo neJaji uMbuyiseli Madlanga. UMeyiwa ekhuluma neSolezwe izolo, uthe kuwukubenza iziphukuphuku ukwenza sengathi uyazwelana nabo ngokufa kukaSenzo. “Ekubeni yonke le nto yasuka ngaye, edinwe ukuthi intombi yakhe wayengayitholi, efika nesibhamu,” kusho uSfiso uMeyiwa. Uthe into eyayicika uLongwe ukuthi intombi yakhe yayihambe noMthoko, kuwo-two-by-two, wazitshela ukuthi kulalwe nayo. “Yasuka lapho le nto. Lo mbhedo abawukhulumayo awukho,” usho kanje. Uthe okubuhlungu ukuthi uNtanzi washaywa, washiswa ngogesi ukuze avume icala. “Ngakho akukho okuzoveza ukuthi uNtanzi umsulwa, yize sazi thina ukuthi umsulwa. Indaba yenkulumo eqoshiwe vele ayikho,” kusho uMeyiwa. Uthe yena ufikelwa ukucasuka ukuthi uLongwe ampende kabi encwadini, wathi ubona emthatha kancane. Uthe ijaji elengamele icala, uMbuso kanjalo nomphenyi omkhulu wecala, ayikho indaba yabo, wathi bona bewundeni bafuna badedelwe bonke abamangalelwa abaphambi kwenkantolo ngoba baboshelwe into engekho. Uthe isimo sikanina asisihle, wathi akasakhulumi nangayo indaba yecala lokubulawa kwendodana yakhe. “Asisayixoxi indaba yecala ngoba iyamthunuka,” usho kanje. Uveze ukuthi kukhona imashi ezoba khona maduze eThekwini, lapho abangahambisani nokwenzeka enkantolo, bezozwakalisa ilaka labo. Uphinde waveza ukuthi kukhona icala alivulele abasingethe icala elisenkantolo njengamanje, athe elokuvimba ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. USenzo wadutshulwa, wabulawa ngo-Okthoba 2014, eseVosloorus, eGauteng, kubo kanina wengane yakhe ongumculi, uKelly Khumalo. Ngokwababekhona kwenzeka isigameko, uSenzo wabulawa yizigebengu ezagasela endlini, zizobamba inkunzi. Nokho umndeni wakhe uthi uLongwe owambulala, njengoba uthi kukhona umngani kamufi owayekhona endlini, owabafonela wabatshela ukuthi sekudubuleke uSenzo ngephutha. Bayisihlanu abamangalelwa ababoshwa ngaleli cala, okumanje bagqigqa inkantolo. Yibo laba abamangalelwa umndeni othi kufanele badedelwe ngoba abanacala.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IZIKHULU zikaMasipala waseKurhuleni, uBrigadier Julius Mkhwanazi noMnuz Kagiso Lerutla, abavele enkantolo izolo Image:  Itumeleng English/ Independent Newspapers AMAPHOYISA aveze ukuthi izikhulu zikaMasipala waseKurhuleni, uBrigadier Julius Mkhwanazi noMnuz Kagiso Lerutla, baboshelwe ukuthi baqasha umuntu owaya kozenza uLerutla enkantolo. ULerutla oyimenenja yomkhandlu, kuthiwa waqasha umuntu ukuthi ayozenza yena enkantolo lapho ayebhekene khona necala lokushayela budedengu. Icala lagcina limlahla uLerutla, wagwetshwa ukuba ayokwenza umsebenzi womphakathini. Kuthiwa lo muntu owayeqashiwe waphinda wazenza uLerutla, waya kokwenza umsebenzi womphakathi okwakufanele wenziwe uLerutla. Lokhu kuvezwe okhulumela amaphoyisa kuzwelonke, uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe. UBrigadier Mathe uthe lo muntu owayeqashiwe wakhokhelwa imali ayihlukaniselana noMkhwanazi. UBrigadier Mathe akazange afune ukusho ukuthi ngabe uzoboshwa yini lo muntu owayeqashwe uLerutla. UMkhwanazi noLerutla bavele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eBoksburg, lapho bebebhekene khona necala lenkohlakalo nelokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uLwesine. UMkhwanazi watholwa nezinhlamvu zesibhamu ngesikhathi eboshwa. UMkhwanazi usolwa ngokusondelana nosomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala. Khonamanjalo: Iphoyisa elisolwa ngokusondelana noMatlala, uSergeant Fannie Nkosi, liqhubekile nokufaka isicelo sebheyili, izolo. UNkosi uboshelwe icala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho nokuphula imigomo yokugcinwa kwezibhamu. Isinqumo esicelweni sakhe sebheyili sizokhishwa kusasa.Naye uMatlala uvele kafushane enkantolo izolo, lapho kunqunywe khona ukuthi asuswe ejele eliKwaZulu-Natal, iBongweni, ayogcinwa eKgosi Mampuru.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Imoto ebihamba abasolwa abahlanu Kubulawe umsolwa oyedwa, kwaboshwa abane ngemuva kokudubulana namaphoyisa e-Athlone. Leli qulu, okusolwa ukuthi liyamataniswa nesigameko sokugetshengwa kwebhizinisi eLansdowne, belihamba ngeToyota Avanza empunga engenazo izinombolo ngesikhathi amaphoyisa ophiko lwe-Flying Squad ezama ukubavimba. Kubikwa ukuthi umshayeli uzame ukubalekela amaphoyisa nokwenze amaphoyisa avulela ngenhlamvu. Imoto igcine ima. Bebebahlanu abasolwa abebengaphakathi, omunye wabo kwatholakala ukuthi ushonile, omunye obelinele uphuthunyiswe esibhedlela iGroote Schuur, abasolwa abasele baboshwa. Uphiko lwe-Independent Police Investigative Directorate luyaphenya ngokwenzekile.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Amatekisi azonyuka ngenxa yokunyuka kukaphethroli BAKHALA ubumayemaye abanikazi bamatekisi angaphansi kwenhlangano ethathwa njengenkulu kunazo zonke kuleli, iSouth African National Taxi Council (SANTACO) ngokunyuka kukaphethroli. Izinkomba zabeCentral Energy Fund (CEF), ziveza ukuthi uphethroli i-95 octane, ungahle unyuke ngo-R5,82 ilitha, kuthi i-93 octane inyuke ngo-R5,32. Zithi udizili wona ungahle unyuke ngo-R10,27 ilitha. Kuvela ukuthi lezi zibalo azikakayifaki intela ekhokhelwa uphethroli, i-fuel levy yona okuthiwa ingahle inyuke ngo-21c ilitha. USihlalo weSantaco KwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Boy Zondi, uthe abanikazi bezimoto bakhala ubumayemaye ngoba ayikaze yenzeke into efuze le emlandweni wokunyuka kukaphethroli eNingizimu Afrika. “Siyaqala ukubhekana nento enje emlandweni. Ukunyuka kwawo ngale ndlela kuzokwenza ukuthi kube nzima kakhulu kubanikazi bezimoto kanjalo nakobasi bethu abangabagibeli,” kusho uZondi. Uthe akungatshazwa ukuthi kuzoba nzima kakhulu ukusebenza njengoba kwaziwa ukuthi kubhekwe kwimpelasonto yePhasika, lapho iningi labantu lisebenzisa izithuthi zomphakathi ukuthutheleka emakhaya kanjalo nasezinkonzweni. “SiyiSantaco ezingeni lesifundazwe, asikaphumi nesinqumo sokuthi imali yokugibela inyuswe masinyane njengoba kuzoba yimpelasonto yePhasika ukuzama ukubhekana nesimo. Ngakho ngokwethu ayizunyuka njengamanje imali yokugibela kodwa ngifuna ukukucacisa ukuthi ngeke sikunqande ukuthi kube khona abanye ososeshini ezindaweni ezehlukene abazoyinyusa manje,” kusho uZondi, othe yibo ososeshini abazobe bezwa ukuthi insimbi ishisa kangakanani. Nokho ukuvezile ukuthi banqume ukuthi babe nomhlangano ophuthumayo ngodaba lukaphethroli ngesonto elizayo, athe emva kwawo, nakanjani bazoyiyusa imali yokugibela. “Nakanjani sizoyinyusa imali yokugibela ngelizayo. Ngeke silinde uJulayi njengoba sihlale senza,” usho kanje. Ebhekise kubelungu babo, okungabagibeli, uthe ucela bakuqonde ukuthi nabo bengosomabhizinisi bemboni, babhekene nesimo esingaphezu kwamandla. “Besingeke siyinyuse imali yokugibela ukube akwenzekanga le mikhuba eyenzekayo. Besizolinda umhla ka-1 Julayi njengenhlalayenza,” kusho uZondi. UMengameli wezwe, uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa ethula inkulumo yokuvala ingqungquthela ye-ANC eLimpopo ngempelasonto, uxwayise ngobunzima obuzayo ngenxa yokunyuka kukaphethroli nodizili. Uthe useyalele ongqongqoshe ukuthi babhekane nezingqinamba ezizodalwa ukwenyuka kukaphethroli nodizili. Ukunyuka kakhulu kukaphethroli kudalwe yizinxushunxushu eziqhubekayo eMiddle East, eziholele ekutheni kunyuke intengo kawoyela, kwase kudala ingcindezi emandleni erandi lakuleli. Uwoyela ongahluziwe unyuke usuka ku-$69 waya ngaphezuku kuka-$115, kanti amandla erandi lehle esuka kuR15,85  aya kuR17,00 uma liqhathaniswa neDollar laseMelika.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNDUNANKULU waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, neNkosi Mabhudu Israel Tembe, eMkhosini woMthayi INKOSI Mabhudu Israel Tembe inesifiso sokuthi uMkhosi woMthayi udlondlobale uze ufike ezingeni lemicimbi emikhulu ehlonishaywo efana neVodacom Durban July kanye nomcimbi womculo i-Cape Town International Jazz Festival. Inkosi ithe nakuba umkhosi uhlukile ukuneDurban July kanye nomcimbi wejazz, iyafisa ukuthi umkhosi nawo ubalwa kanye nale micimbi uma kukhulunywa ngemicimbi ethuthukisa umnotho. Ikusho lokhu ngesikhathi ixoxa neSolezwe. UMkhosi woMthayi ugujwa minyaka yonke lapho khona abesifazane besuke belethe imikhiqizo eyakhiwe ngamaganu okubalwa kuyo notshwala obuvutshelwe ngamaganu. Inkosi ithe ifuna ukuthi umkhosi uthuthukise umnotho wendawo. "Nakuba umkhosi ungafani neDurban July, kodwa iDurban July uma ifikile eThekwini isho ukuthi izoshiya cishe u-R1 billion emnothweni ngesonto nje elilodwa. Ijazz eCape Town nayo yenza into efanayo. Siyafisa ke ukuthi nalapha emakhaya kube khona umnotho osalayo ozokwenza ukuthi abantu abaqashisa ngezindawo zokulala bakwazi ukuziphilisa kuze kube kuphinde kufika esikhathi lapho kwanda abantu abaqasha izindawo zokulala." Inkosi ithe ifuna ukuthi kube nemibukiso ezokuba khona uma kunomkhosi. "Sifuna ukuba nombukiso lapho sizobambisana noMnyango wezoLimo. Sifuna ukubona ukuthi abantu bengasizakala kwelimo. Inkampani yezimoto enkulu yezimoto, iToyota, nayo izokwenza  umbukiso. Izimoto zabo zithengwa kakhulu endaweni. Banesibopho sokubuyisela emphakathini. Sizobheka ukuthi yini abangayenzela umphakathi." Inkosi ithe ifuna ukuthi baphinde balekelele abantu abadayisa imikhiqizo ukuthi bakwazi ukudayisela amazwe angaphandle. Inkosi ithe ifuna nokuthi baqinise nasemnothweni wasolwandle ikakhulukazi ukudoba. "Kusenomnotho ongathintiwe lapha kwezokuvakasha, umnotho wasolwandle. Lento isakhulunywa nje, isebenzela kakhulu iWestern Cape lapho kudotshwa kakhulu ofishi. Lo mnotho unamandla kakhulu. Nathi siyafisa ukusondeza ochwepheshe." Inkosi inamava kwezokuvakasha kanye nezokuthuthukiswa komnotho njengoba isike yaba usihlalo wamabhodi ezinhlangano zezokuvakasha. Inkosi ike yaba usihlalo webhodi leSimangaliso Wetland Park, ike yaba iphini likasihlalo webhodi, futhi ike yaba ilungu lebhodi lezeMvelo KZN Wildlife.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMENGAMELI wezwe uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa IPHALAMENDE lichithe isicelo se-African Transformation Movement (ATM), sokuba kuqalwe uhlelo lokukhipha uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa esikhundleni. I-ATM ibifuna ukuthi kuqalwe uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni emva kombiko wophiko olugada ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa, i-Ipid, oluveze ukuthi abaqaphi bakaRamaphosa baphula imigomo ngesikhathi bephenya ngokuntshontshwa kwezindodla zemali epulazi likaRamaphosa. Umbiko we-Ipid osanda kunekelwa izwe, ukhombe ngenjumbane izikhulu ezazigada uRamaphosa ngesikhathi kuntshontshwa imali epulazini lakhe ngo-2021. IPhalamende lake lwaqala uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni ngo-2022, ngesikhathi kuvela izinsolo okukuqala. Nokho iPhalamende lachitha umbiko wethimba elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo, okwasho ukuthi uRamaphosa uyaphunyula esiphakamisweni sokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. I-ATM iyona eyayifake isicelo sokuthi kuqalwe uphenyo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni esachithwa. Emva kokudedelwa kombiko we-Ipid, i-ATM, iphinde yabhalela iPhalamende icela ukuthi kuvuswe lolu daba. USomlomo wePhalamende, uNkk Thoko Didiza, uthe iPhalamende livele selaqeda ngalolu daba. Ukusho lokhu empendulweni yencwadi ayithumele i-ATM. "Uzokhumbula ukuthi ngesikhathi ufaka isicelo sokuqala, wawufuna kuphenywe izinsolo ezifanayo. IPhalamende lanquma ukuqoka ithimba elalizophenya. Sekuwumlando ukuthi iPhalamende lanquma ukuchitha umbiko wethimba." UNkk Didiza uthe iPhalamende alikwazi ukubuye liqale phansi liphenye lezi zinsolo, ngaphandle uma kungaba nesinqumo senkantolo esiphoqa ukuthi kuqalwe phansi uphenyo. I-EFF yaphonsela inselelo ukuchithwa kombiko wethimba eliholwa uNgcobo. INkantolo yoMthethosisekelo kulindeleke ukuthi ikhiphe isinqumo sayo maduze. Umholi we-ATM, uMnuz Vuyo Zungula, uthe kuyabadumaza ukuchithwa kwesicelo sabo. UZungula uthe uNkk Didiza usebenzise izaba ukuchitha isicelo sabo. Uthe bazoqhubeka nokulwela ukuthi uRamaphosa aphendule ngodaba lwasePhala Phala.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Umndeni ka-Albert Mazibuko izolo obuhambele inkonzo yesikhumbuzo sakhe eCFCI eThekwini IZOQALA ngokungcwatshwa kuqala ngo-8 ekuseni, bese kulandela inkonzo yomngcwabo wayo ingwazi engasekho yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, uMdletshe Albert Mazibuko (77), eshone ngeledlule esibhedlela, ngemuva kokugula isikhashana. Lokhu kuvezwe umfowabo enkonzweni yesikhumbuzo ebiseCFCI eBerea eThekwini izolo. U-Abednigo Mazibuko, oke wacula kwiMambazo ngaphambi kokuthatha umhlalaphansi, uthe umfowabo wazisholo yena ukuthi ufuna ukufihlwa kubo eNtabamhlophe, e-Estcourt. INDODANA ka-Albert Mazibuko uNhlanhla ogqoke isudi emnyama icula neqembu iLadysmith Black Mambazo enkonzweni yesikhumbuzo izolo Uthe ngenxa yemithetho yakule ndawo okuzofihlwa kuyo, bahlele ukuthi ekuseni kuqale umngcwabo afihlwe bese kuthi ngo-9 kube nenkonzo ezoba sesikoleni iMtshezi High, e-Estcourt ngoMgqibelo ekuseni. "Indawo azofihlwa kuyo inemithetho kakhulu, ngakho sizoqala ngokumfihla ekuseni bese kulandela inkonzo ezobe ihambisana nezikhulumi ezihlukene," kusho uMazibuko. Uthe umfowabo ubengumuntu onothando, nobexhasana kakhulu ezintweni abantu abazenzayo. "Ubenothando umfowethu, enomusa elungile futhi kakhulu. Ubengumuntu owesekanayo kunoma yini oyenzayo futhi ekwenza konke ngomoya owodwa. Wamxhasa uMshengu enza konke ayekusho njengoba inhloso kaMshengu kwakungukuthi umculo neqembu udume kuzona zonke izindawo, ngempela bakwenza lokho bebambene, kwaze kwaba uyakholwa uMshengu, bayihamba le ndlela naye wagcina ekholwa," kuchaza uMazibuko. ABEBEHAMBELE inkonzo yokukhumbula ingwazi yeMambazo u-Albert Mazibuko Image: Doctor Ngcobo/Independent Media Ubonge ukuxhaswa abantu kulesi sikhathi esinzima, athe ukwesekwa abakutholile kubathobe kakhulu. U-Enos Phungula ongomunye wamalungu amadala aleli qembu, uthe kushayisa ngovalo ukuzokhuluma enkonzweni kaMazibuko, kodwa akujabulelayo wukuthi ulihambile ibanga lakhe waliqeda. "Ibanga lakhe uhambe waliqeda emculweni njengoba aze washiya yena esethanda. Sisacula, wayefika ngisho egula kodwa azinikele kukho konke akwenzayo, ushiye kuleli qembu esekhulile. Ngiyabonga kinina bafana bakwaMshengu ngokugcina iqembu liphila kangaka, nize ningavumi ukuthi  life," kusho yena. AMALUNGU eMambazo enkonzweni yokukhumbula  u-Albert Mazibuko eThekwini izolo Image: Doctor Ngcobo/Independent Media Indodana kaMazibuko uNhlanhla, nayo ifakazele izikhulumi ebesezikhulume ngaphambi kwayo, yathi uyise ubakhulise ngothando. "Ubaba ubesithumelela amakhadi anemiyalezo nomculo osuka phesheya kwezilwandle. Kuwona wonke amazwe akade ewahambela, ubesithumelela amakhadi akhona esitshela indlela asithanda ngayo. Ubaba bekuthi uma ezofona ocingweni kudala, kushaye ihora lesine ntambama sekunolayini wokulinda ukukhuluma naye, ezositshela ukuthi usithanda kangakanani futhi athi asiziphathe kahle. Lokhu kwakusho kukhulu kithina," kusho uNhlanhla. USibongiseni Tshabalala, uthe kukhulunywe konke ngoMazibuko wathi abakubongayo yisikhathi ababenaso naye, esibe mnandi ebahola njengobaba wabo. Uthe ubaba wabo ngisho bonile, ubengabajezisi ngendlela enzima njengoba yena wabatshela ukuthi wakhula eshaywa ngakho ubehlala nabo ababonise. Uhlelo lwenkonzo beluphethwe wumsakazi woKhozi FM uPhindi P, kanti kunandise amaqembu ahlukene esicathamiya okulindeleke ukuthi aqhubeke nasenkonzweni yomngcwabo. Kube sekubonakala nabacula owokholo okubalwa kubo uSgwili, Ayanda Ntanzi nabanye.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IMINI Cooper JCW ibukeka i-sporty futhi iyawadonsa amehlo Image: FANELESIBONGE BENGU IMOTO: MINI COOPER JCW UKWANDA kwamaSport Utility Vehicle (SUV) emakethe emhlabeni jikelele kugcina kwenze zingasheshi ukufika kuqala emqondweni izimoto ezifana neMINI Cooper. Nokho uma isiphambi kwakho kwakheka uthando ngayo emehlweni akho. IMINI Cooper yimoto enomlando omude nedumile njengoba ike yavela ngisho emafilimini. Ebengihamba ngayo yiMINI Cooper John Cooper Works (JWC). Igama uma selijobelelwe ngalolu hlobo kusho ukuthi ishuniwe futhi namandla athe xaxa. Nebala uma uyibuka ngaphandle inemihlobiso yombala obomvu kwibhonethi omesha kamnandi nokhakhayi lwayo namakhava ezibuko. Ngaphambili inamalambu angama-LED okungama-headlights nama-headlights. Kwi-grille iqoshiwe uJohn Cooper Works ukuze ungadideki nakancane. Lo mbala obomvu womhlobiso uyavela futhi nakuma-brake callipers alunguza emarimini angu-18 inch nokuyenza ibukeke kahle Ngemuva ine-spoiler esikhulu esigqamisa ukuba sporty kwayo, amalambu angama-LED i-diffuser ngezansi nenqawe eyodwa phakathi nendawo. Ngaphandle yinhle, nginconywe omunye udade ethi ngihamba ngemoto “e-cute”. Ngaphakathi nakhona bayenze yabukeka kahle ngoba akukho mabhathini ayinqwaba. Cishe konke ukwenza kwi-touchscreen infotainment system eyindilinga enkulu phakathi nendawo. Amazinga okushisa uwahlela khona futhi kusobala, iveza inkombandlela, ingaphandle uma upaka, uxhuma khona iselula nge-Apple CarPlay, isivinini ohamba ngaso, uphethroli onawo, nokunye. IMINI Cooper JCW ayinaluxhaxha lwamabhathini ngaphakathi okuningi ukwenza kwi-touchscreen infotainment system eyindilinga Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Izinkinobho ezikhona ngezokunyusa umsindo, eyokushintsha ama-drive modes okanye ama-experience njengoba bekubiza kanjalo kwaMINI, eyokuyidumisa neyegiya. Amanye amabhathini asesiteringini esiqumbe kamnandi uma usibambile. Phezu kwaso akukho instrument cluster kunalokho kune-heads up display okwazi ukuyivala uma uthanda. Iveza imininingwane ebalulekile njengejubane. Ngikuthandile ukuthi ngisho inkombandlela uyivula kwiselula nge-Apple CarPlay iyakutshengisa ukuthi kumele ujike kuphi. Umgibeli nomshayeli bahlala ngokukhululeka ezihlalweni zesikhumba okwazi ukuzifudumeza. Bengingakulindele ukuthi esomshayeli siyakuwotawota. Inendawo yokubeka iziphuzo, ukushaja iselula ngaphandle kwentambo, indawo yokuphumuza ingalo bese kuthi okhakhayini ibe ne-sunroof. Ngemuva nokho isihlalo sincane. Ngemuva kwesihlalo sami ngishayela akekho obengakwazi ukungena ahlale. Nesebhuthi sincane iyakhombisa ukuthi ngeyomuntu ongenamndeni. Kulezi zinsukwana engizichithe nayo ngiyizwe ihamba kahle emgwaqeni. Noma ikhasa phansi ibingazweli kakhulu emigwaqeni ngaphandle uma umgwaqo umubi ngempela. Ukushintsha i-drive mode uyifake kuJohn Cooper Works bekuyilapho wonke amandla ayo ebivele iwakhiphe kalula khona. Amandla lawa angu-170kW ne-torque engu-380Nm enjinini engu-2.0 litre turbo kaphethroli. U-gearbox uyi-7 speed dct. Kule drive mode kuqina isiteringi ne-suspension umgwaqo uwuzwe ubunjalo bawo. Noma unyathela isivinini sinyuka manje kwazise phela ukusuka ku-0 iye ku-100km/h kuyithatha imizuzwana engu-6.1 kanti ijubane ligcina ku-250km/h. Bengithi uma ngishintsha igiya nginyukela kwelesibili ngizwe kukhala ithayi langaphambili izama ukunamathela bese iyanamathela etiyeleni. Nasemakhoneni ibijika kalula ngejubane. Nomculo obukhala ezipikheni zeHarman Kardon ngike ngathi ukuwukhohlwa sengizwa ukuduma kwayo okumnandi. Nokho kugcina ngaphakathi kuphela ngoba ngathi kwengezwe ngazo izipikha ngoba ngaphandle akukho nhlobo. Kuphethroli ibingakhalisi indlela ebidla ngayo ngoba ihambe iphuza 7.6l/100km. Ngokwamandla ayo ungayibheka njengembangi ye-VW Golf 8.5 GTI yize intengo iyibeka kwiGolf 1.4. MINI Cooper 3-door hatch JCW – R745 574 Iphuma ne-maintenance plan yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-100 000km.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Constable Emmanuel Shimmy Ntoampe UConstable Bheki Gavin Sithole, Adedelwe ngebheyili amaphoyisa amathathu asebenzela uphiko lwe-Gauteng se-Crime Intelligence, aboshwe ngezithuba zabo-16:20 ngeSonto kuRakoma Street, eTokoza. La maphoyisa okunguConstable Emmanuel Shimmy Ntoampe, uConstable Bheki Gavin Sithole, uConstable Tshabangu anikezwe ibheyili ka-R1500 umuntu ngamunye. Umsolwa wesine okuthiwa uyimpimpi yamaphoyisa ugcinwe esitokisini. Laba babhekene necala lokugebenga ibhizinisi eliphethwe ngabasePakistan eliseduze neLetsoho Shopping Centre. Kuthiwa bagasele esitolo bazethula njengamaphoyisa bafuna ugwayi ongekho emthethweni. Kuthiwa baphinde babopha ummangali nabasebenzi bakhe ngozankosi ngaphambi kokuthi balayishe amabhokisi kagwayi ongekho emthethweni ezimotweni zabo. Umnikazi webhizinisi odabuka ePakistani ubikele i-Thathazonke Anti-Crime Community Group, yaphendula ngokushesha abasolwa baboshwa. La malungu akhonjwe umkhuzi wawo njengabasebenzi besifundazwe beCrime Intelligence. Uphenyo lokuqala luphinde lwaholela ekuthathweni kwalobu bufakazi obutholwe kubasolwa: •Amabhokisi amahlanu kagwayi ongekho emthethweni •Izibhamu zokudlala ezine •Izibhamu zikahulumeni ezimbili  futhi kuthathwe ne-video eqoshwe endaweni yesehlo. Icala lizobuyela eNkantolo yeMantshi yasePalm Ridge ngomhla ka-17 Ephreli 2026.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Izovula ngoJulius Mkhwanazi ikhomishini kaMadlanga IKhomishini kaMadlanga kulindeleke ukuthi iqhubeke nomsebenzi wayo ngoLwesibili ngemuva kwekhefu lePhasika elifushane njengoba kulindeleke ukuthi iPhini leNhloko yamaPhoyisa kaMasipala waseKurhuleni (EMPD) uJulius Mkhwanazi abuye azokwethula ubufakazi. UJeremy Michaels, okhulumela iKhomishini uthe ofakazi abangu-49 sebethule ubufakazi ezinsukwini ezingu-84. UMichaels phambilini umemezele ukuthi ikhomishini izothatha ikhefu lePhasika ngoLwesithathu, 25 Mashi, 2026, iqale ukusebenza ngoLwesibili, 07 Ephreli 2026. Uthe uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa welule isikhathi seKhomishini ukuze ikwazi kuqhubeka nohlu olude lofakazi abasazokwethula ubufakazi ngaphansi kwesifungo. IKhomishini kusamele imemezele ufakazi olandelayo. Ngosuku lokugcina ngaphambi kwekhefu (ngoMashi 24, 2026), iPhini leNhloko yamaPhoyisa oPhiko Lwezokuvikelwa Kwempahla kanye Nezokuphepha eMnyangweni Wamaphoyisa kaMasipala weDolobha laseTshwane (TMPD), uRevo Spies, wethula ubufakazi ngamaqembu obugebengu angenisile komasipala. Uchaze kabanzi ngohlelo lwethenda olungekho emthethweni lokuqapha izakhiwo zikamasipala, olubandakanya iGubis 85 Solutions, okuyinkampani yonogada eyathinteka ebufakazini bephoyisa ezingaphansi kophiko lwe-Gauteng Organised Crime Unit uSergeant Fannie Nkosi.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM, uLucky Nkosi, usebuyela emsebenzini ayevele ewenza wobuthishela Image: FACEBOOK/LUCKY NKOSI KUFAKAZELEKE isisho sesiZulu esithi, "ukuwa kwendlu wukuvuka kwenye" kowayengumsakazi woKhozi FM, uLucky Nkosi, osekuvele izindaba zokuthi ubuyela emkhakheni wezemfundo ayevele ewusheba nokusakaza. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi uLucky, obese ehlale iminyaka ewu-22 kulo msakazo, ube ngomunye wabasakazi engavuselelwanga inkontileka yabo ngesikhathi kushintshwa izinhlelo, okwenziwa minyaka yonke emisakazweni eminingi njalo ngo-Ephreli. Lezi zindaba zokubuyela kwezemfundo ziqinisekiswe wuyena uLucky uqobo, engxoxweni neSolezwe lapho edalule khona ukuthi lokhu kwenzeke ngokuthi anqobe icala ayebekwe lona ngo-2019, ngezinsolo zokuhlukumeza ozakwabo ngokweyamene nocansi. “Udaba lwaqala ngezindaba zokuthi kuvele ukuthi ngangifunwa yizinkabi, zifuna ukungibulala, okwahamba kwaze kwakapakela emsebenzini wami wobuthishela, kwakhona ozakwethu abathile abangenzela uzungu lokuthi ngigcine ngimiswa emsebenzini ngoba bekhala ngokuthi bazizwa bengaphephile ukuthi bangasebenza nami ngenxa yalezi zinsolo." OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM, uLucky Nkosi, usebuyela emsebenzini ayevele ewenza wobuthishela Uthe: “Kuhambe kwaze kwafika ekutheni udaba luze luphenywe wuMnyango wezeMfundo, kwase kuba khona abanye abanginyundela ngokungenameka nangamacala okuhlukumeza okweyamene nocansi ngoba befuna ukuthi ngixoshwe emsebenzini.” Uthe udaba luqhubekile yonke le minyaka lithethwa enkantolo, kwaze kwaba icala liyamthetha ngoMashi 31, kwaphuma isinqumo sokuthi abuyele emsebenzini ezinsukwini ezintathu kusukela ngalelo langa. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kwaphuma nomyalelo wokuthi kumele ukuthi akhokhelwe imali ewu-R2.8 million wesinxephezelo somholo obekumele ngabe ubewuthola yonke le minyaka kuqhubeka icala, ebe esamile emsebenzini abewenza eMariannpark Primary, KwaMamdekazi, eMariannhill, lapho ayewuthishanhloko khona. “Konke lokhu kufakazela ukuthi kusukela ekuqaleni bengingenacala kepha kwakuvele kuwuzungu lwabantu abebefuna ukucekela phansi umsebenzi wami nesithunzi sami engikusebenzele kanzima yonke le minyaka. Kufakazele nobukhona bukaNkulunkulu njengoba kuqondane nesikhathi lapho kuphela umsebenzi emsakazweni,” usho kanje. Udalule nokuthi ngale kobuthishela, usebheke ukuthi akwenze iminyaka emithathu kuphela bese eshenxa kukho kanti uzoqhubeka futhi nemisebenzi yakhe yomculo njengoba kuzothi ngo-Okthoba 2, enze umcimbi wedili lomculo wamakhwaya, iGauteng Meets KZN. “Ngale kwalokho, ngihlela nokuthi ingxenye yemali engizoyithola manje ngiyitshale ebhizinisini lami leShisanyama nelehhotela, engizokwakha eVryheid, ukucaba indlela yami yezamabhizinisi njengoba ngangivele nginesifiso sokugxila kuwona,” kusho uLucky.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Omunye wabasunguli beLadysmith Black Mambazo u-Albert Mazibuko ongasekho emhlabeni ALISEKHO emhlabeni ilungu leLadysmith Black Mambazo ebese lithathe umhlalaphansi, uMnuz Mdletshe Albert Mazibuko, elithathwe ukugula ngeSonto ebusuku. UMazibuko (77), ongomunye wabasunguli beMambazo, ushonele esibhedlela abengeniswe kuso ngenxa yokugula. Yize imininingwane ephelele ingakacaci kodwa imenenja yeqembu uXolani Majozi ikuqinisekisile kwiSolezwe ushona kwakhe. “Yinto eyenzeke ngeSonto ebusuku ngakho ngicela unginikeze isikhashana ngixhumane kahle nomndeni ngithole imininingwane ephelele. Kuphela ngingakuqinisekisa ukuthi akasekho,” kusho uMajozi. UMazibuko uthathe umhlalaphansi ngonyaka odlule lapho iqembu lethule khona amalungu amasha okunguGagamela Shabalala noBabuyile Shabalala. Njengamanje iMambazo inomjikelezo phesheya kodwa kulindeleke ukuthi ibuye ngoLwesihlanu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: US President Donald Trump UMENGAMELI waseMelika, uMnuz Donald Trump Image: Mandel Ngan / AFP ZIFINYELELE kwangqingetshe izingxoxo zamazwe amabili alwayo, iMelika ne-Iran. La mazwe ahlulekile ukufinyelela esivumelwaneni sokuqeda impi emva kwezingxoxo ezidonse amahora awu-21. Izingxoxo ziqale emva kokuba womabili la mazwe evumelane ngokubeka phansi izikhali kuze kube amasonto amabili. Bekunethemba lokuthi izingxoxo zizoholela ekupheleni kwempi eqale ngenyanga eyedlule kepha izolo, iMelika imemezele ungqingetshe ezingxoxweni ezibanjelwe ezweni iPakistan. IPhini likaMengameli waseMelika, uMnuz JD Vance, lithe banqume ukubuyela eMelika emva kukofinyelela kwangqingetshe kwezingxoxo. "Senze isiphakamiso sokugcina kubona, bangavumelana naso. Kube sekusicacela ukuthi ayikho into esisayihlalele ePakistan, sanquma ukuthi ababuyele ekhaya labo abebesimele ezingxoxweni." UVance akazange afune ukuchaza ukuthi ikuphi lokhu i-Iran engafunanga ukuvumelana nakho. Abaholi base-Iran bathe bazibophezele ezingxoxweni. Bathe iMelika isheshe yaphonsa ithawula ezingxoxweni njengoba bekungokokuqala eminyakeni engu-40, ukuba kube nezingxoxo phakathi kwabaholi bamazwe. Akucaci ukuthi ukufinyelela kwangqingetshe kwezingxoxo kusibekaphi isivumelwano sala mazwe sokumisa impi. Amazwe omhlaba abambe umoya ngale mpi eholele ekunyukeni kukawoyela emhlabeni wonke jikelele. Intego kawoyela inyuke kakhulu emva kokuqubuka kwempi ngenyanga eyedlule. Ukunyuka kwentengo kawoyela kuholele ekunyukeni kukaphethroli emazweni amaningi. Lapha eNingizimu Afrika uphethroli unyuke ngo-R3.06 kwathi udizili wona wanyuka ngo-R7.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNKSZ Happy Mthethwa obulawe yisoka ephuma ePhasikeni KUSENZIMA ukwamukela isimo emndenini wowesifazane waseSakhamkhanya, eDoringkop, KwaDukuza, okuthiwa ugwazwe wabulawa yisoka lakhe eqeda kubuya ePhasikeni ngeSonto. Kulesi sigameko kufe ngesihluku uNksz Happy Mthethwa (35), okuthiwa ubulawe umsolwa, ethi uyolanda izimpahla zakhe emzini abehlala kuwo, ukumkhombisa ukuthi akadlali uma ethi ucu alusahlangani. Ngokusho kukadadewabo kamufi, uNksz Kholeka Mthethwa, isigameko senzeke besanda kubuya enkonzweni yePhasika ababeye kuyo ngoLwesihlanu. “Sithe sibuya wahlala cishe imizuzu engu-30, wase ethi usaya kulo muzi umsolwa abehlala kuwo ngoba ewugada khona endaweni. Ngisale ngalala, ngamangala ukuthi akakabuyi ngesikhathi ngivuka kodwa ngangazitshela ukuthi kukhona osekumehlele,” kusho uNksz Mthethwa. Uthe bekuyizithuba zasemini ngesikhathi kufika umyalezo wokuthi abaphuthume kwamakhelwane walo muzi ngoba umufi ulimele. “Ngithukile ukuthi ingabe uselinyazwa yini. Ngithe uma ngifika khona, besekugcwele nabantu, ngambona edindilizile kuveranda walo makhelwane othumele umyalezo. Bekukhombisa ukuthi akasekho kodwa ngendlela ebengiphanjanelwe ngayo yikhanda, ngiqhubekile ngafonela i-ambulensi,” kuchaza uNksz Mthethwa othe ngesikhathi efike ngaso i-ambulensi, ivele yaqinisekisa ukuthi umufi akasekho. Uthe bathole ukuthi umsolwa uqale ukumhlasela emzini womunye umakhelwane angumngani wakhe umufi. Uqhube wathi bathole ukuthi ubemshaya, emklinya kodwa kucaca ukuthi umufi uyamhlula ngamandla. “Kulowo muzi sifice kumahliphihliphi, kulimele ngisho amawindi, kukhombisa ukuthi bekuliwa. Uma sithola, kuthiwa ukwazile ukuphunyuka uHappy, wabalekela kwamakhelwane wesibili, okuyilapho okuthiwa umsolwa umjahile wamfica khona, wase edonsa ummese awuthole eduze, wamgwaza ngawo,” kusho yena. Uveze ukuthi ngesikhathi besalinde amaphoyisa, umsolwa uqhamuke kulo muzi awugadayo eqimbile, wazishaya isifuba ethi njengoba edindilizile, wuye ombulele. “Ubegcwele igazi yonke indawo. Abesilisa abambalwa ebebekhona bazamile ukumjaha, emva kokumuzwa ekhuluma kanje, bathi ngeke phela akhulume kanjalo phambi kwabo, nokho ukwazile ukubaleka abashiye njengoba namanje engakaboshwa,” usho kanje. UNksz Mthethwa uveze ukuthi umsolwa nomufi bese bethandane cishe iminyaka emithathu, wathi muva nje, umufi ubesemala kodwa umsolwa ala aphethe. “Ubekwazi ukubekezela uHappy kodwa lona wesilisa engamhloniphi. Ubevele aqonywe, izintombi zakhe zifonele uHappy zimthuke. Ugcine esecikeka, esethi abuphele ubudlelwano kodwa umsolwa engafuni," kusho uNksz Mthethwa. Uveze ukuthi ngisho nangempelasonto yePhasika besenkonzweni, wayelokhu emfonela ngama-video call. Uthe njengoba umufi ebese efudukele eGoli ukuyozama amatoho, nabehlala nabo khona bakhala esifanayo sama-video call. Uveze ukuthi umsolwa ubulala umufi nje, unengane enamasonto amathathu izelwe, okuthiwa uyithole kowesifazane wakhona endaweni, wathi umsolwa ungowokuzalwa eNkwalini, eShowe. Uveze ukuthi bamfonele udadewabo bemazisa ngomonakalo umsolwa asewenzile, kwangathi uyazwelana nabo. “Simangele uma esefika namaphoyisa ngoMsombuluko, bezothatha izimpahla zikamsolwa. Kuvele kwasicacela ukuthi uye omthumile,” usho kanje. Uthe njengamanje abazi ukuthi umsolwa ukuziphi izinkalo kodwa batholile ukuthi uyaxhumana nomngani wakhe osendaweni, unina wengane yakhe encane kanjalo nodadewabo. Uveze ukuthi uma amaphoyisa engaphenya laba bobathathu, lingavela iqiniso lokuthi umsolwa ubhacephi. Umufi uneziqu zobuthisha azithole eNyuvesi yaseZululand. Ushiye izingane ezintathu, ezineminyaka ephakathi kweyisishiyagalolunye no-17. Kuthiwa ubulawa nje, ubehle ngoLwesine, esuka etohweni lakhe eGoli. Uveze ukuthi izimpahla abehlose ukuyozilanda, ubulawe engakazithathi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe amaphoyisa aKwaDukuza avule icala lokubulawa komuntu kulandela isigameko sokugwazwa abulawe ngumsolwa amaziyo ngeSonto. Uthe ngesikhathi amaphoyisa efika endaweni yesigameko, isidumbu sikamufi besinezibazi, kanjalo nenxeba lokugwazwa. Imbangela yokubulala uthe ibingakaziwa.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UBaby Cele ongomunye wabalingisi abebelingisa indawo ephambili emdlalweni, iGenesis ophelayo kusasa kuMzansi Magic SEKUSELE kancane ziphothulwe izinhlelo zomdlalo omusha ozovala isikhala seGenesis, efinyelela emaphethelweni kusasa. Lo mdlalo obukhonjiswa ngo-7.30, phakathi nesonto nogxile kwezenkolo, ukwengavuselelwanga emidlalweni ekhona kulesi siteshi, iningi layo eqale ngonyaka odlule. NgoFebhuwari umdlalo Ithonga ufinyelele emaphethelweni, okuze kube manje awukho umdlalo ovale isikhala sawo. Kunalokho uMzansi Magic uthathe umdlalo Inimba obukhonjiswa ngo-9 ebusuku, wawehlisela ku-8.30. Umthombo weSolezwe ongaphakathi kulo mdlalo, uveze ukuthi kusuka ngoJulayi, kuzoqala umdlalo ozovala isikhala seGenesis, kodwa umdlalo Inimba wona usazoqhubeka nokuba kulesi sikhathi okuso manje njengoba zingekho izindaba ezithinta ukumenyezelwa kwemidlalo emibili. "Ngenyanga ezayo sizomemezela umdlalo omusha ozovala isikhala seGenesis njengoba iphela manje. Okwamanje umdlalo basematasa nawo, uzoqala ukuqoshwa ngenyanga ezayo bese kuthi ngoJuni maphakathi nawo kumenyezelwe konke ngawo. Yebo iMultichoice ibhekene nobunzima bokubeka isenti phezu kwelinye kodwa kulesi sikhala ngeke kungabi khona mdlalo oba khona. Ngibona sengathi wumdlalo wesithathu ongeke usaba khona," kusho umthombo. Uveze ukuthi okwamanje kuzoba khona izinhlelo nemidlalo emincane ezongena kulesi sikhathi kuze kube kuqala umdlalo omusha. "Zikhona izinhlelo ezintsha ezizokhonjiswa kulesi sikhathi kuze kube kufika isikhathi somdlalo omusha. Kunzima okwenzeka ngaphakathi kule nkampani ngoba akujwayelekile, konke manje sekumele kuqale eFrance ukuze kube yizikhulu zenkampani iCanal+ ezishoyo ukuthi akuqhutshekwe. Izolambisa amaciko amaningi le nto eyenzekayo njengoba lo mdlalo uphela nje. Kumele ngabe omusha usukhona usuqoshiwe ukuze uqale ngoMsombuluko kodwa konke lokho akwenzekile ngenxa yokushintsha kwesimo sokusebenza," kuchaza umthombo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ZIMI ngomumo izinhlaka ezibhekele ukuphepha eNingizimu Afrika uma kwenzeka kuqubuka izibhelu ezifuze ezenzeka ngoJulayi 2021. IPhini likaMengameli lezwe, uMnuz Paul Mashatile, liveze ukuthi ngeke kuwuphinde uhulumeni okwenzeka ngo-2021, lapho izinhlaka zokuphepha zazingalindele ukuthi kungase kuqubuke izibhelu, ezakhahlameza kakhulu KwaZulu-Natal naseGauteng. Lezi zibhelu ezathatha cishe isonto lonke, zacekela phansi impahla yezitolo namafemu kuleli, kutatshwa impahla kwaphinde kwashiswa ngenxa yokuthi kukhona ababezwelana nokuboshwa kowayengumengameli wezwe, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, osengumholi weqembu iMKP. "Zafika singalindele izibhelu zango-2021. Ezobunhloli zazingekho ezingeni kodwa manje mkhulu umehluko okhona. Silindele noma yini, siyokwazi futhi ukusheshe siyihlonze ingozi ngoba ukhona umnyakazo owenziwe nangasohlangothini lwezobunhloli kuleli," kusho uMashatile ephendula imibuzo yamalungu ePhalamende, izolo. Bevile ku-300 abantu abashona kulezi zibhelu, kwaboshwa abevile ku-5 000, kwadaleka umonakalo wezigidigidi zamarandi emnothweni. Umholi weBosa, uDkt Mmusi Maimane, ukhale ngokushoda kwamaphoyisa, wathi abantu abaphephile ekubeni eqhethe ePhalamende. "Kungani amaphoyisa engayi kovikela abantu kodwa agcwele la ePhalamende?" UMashatile uthe iPhalamende lashiswa ngakho abafuni kuphinde lesi sehlo futhi ngomuso. "Uma kunomengameli wezwe kudingeka kuqiniswe ezokuphepha. Ukhona umnyakazo wokuqasha amaphoyisa ukuze aqaphe ubugebengu kuleli. Sikhathazekile ngobugebengu obunendlakadla kuleli," usho kanje. Uveze ukubaluleka kokubambisana uma kuzoliwa ngempumelelo nobugebengu kuleli. "Phambilini. bekukhona amakomiti okulwa nobugebengu emphakathini. Abesiza kakhulu kule nkinga ngoba umphakathi iwona owazi ukusuka nokuhlala kobugebengu. Ngezinye zezinto okudingeka sizibuyise ukulwa nobugebengu." Uthe nezobulungiswa kumele zibe yingxenye empini yobugebengu ukuze kungaboshwa umuntu manje kusasa useyadedelwa.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: USOLWAZI wase-UKZN weluleka othisha abangasebenzi ngokungabasiza ukuqhuba impilo INSELELO yokungabinamali eyanele ngasohlangothini lukahulumeni yenza ungakwazi ukuqasha othisha abadingeka ezikoleni zakuleli. Le nkinga ihlale ivezwa njengenye yezinselelo ezibhekene noMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo, njengoba othisha abangaqashiwe begcina sebeqhinqa emahhovisi befuna ukuqashwa. Sekuphenduke insakavukela ukuthi intsha ihlale ikhala kuhulumeni ngokushoda kwamathuba emisebenzi, kulo mkhakha. NoSolwazi uPhumlani Myende, wophiko loMkhakha wezeMfundo lwase-University of KwaZulu-Natal, uthe nakuba ekuqonda ukukhathazeka kwabantu abasha abaneziqu zalo mkhakha kodwa abangasebenzi, kepha ziningi izinselelo eziholela kuleso simo. UMyende uthe akukhona ukuthi amathuba omsebenzi walo mkhakha awasekho, kepha kunezimo ezenza ukuthi uhlelo lokuqasha othisha lungabe lusenzeka ngendlela efanele nobekwenzeka ngayo eminyakeni edlule, lapho othisha abebeqashwa khona kakhulu. “Enye yezingqinamba ezikhona wukuthi uhulumeni awunayo imali eyanele yokuthi kuqashwe futhi kukhokhelwe isibalo sothisha abadingekayo ezikoleni ezweni, lokho kufakazelwa wukuthi ngokomthetho, kumele ngabe amagumbi okufundela aba nezingane eziwu-35 igumbi ngalinye, kepha kwezinye izikole kuba nabafundi abawu-60, ngisho nangaphezulu." Uthe:“Konke lokho kuwuphawu lokuthi inkulu kakhulu inkinga ekhona, kangangokuthi kwezinye izikole kuyenzeka ukuthi kube nothisha abaze baphoqeleke ukufundisa izifundo abangaqeqeshelwe ukuzifundisa ngenxa yokungabi namali kukahulumeni.” Eqhuba, uthe ocwaningweni olwenziwe yiStellenbosch University ngo-2022 kuya ku-2024, kwavela ukuthi enye futhi inkinga ekhona wukuthi kunenqwaba yabantu abaqeqeshelwe umkhakha wobuthishela, kodwa bagabe ngezifundo ezingasadingeki kangako ezikoleni. “Nokuthi futhi kunenkinga yothisha abaqeqeshelwe ukufundisa izifundo zasemabangeni aphezulu ekubeni kube kusobala ukuthi othisha abadingeka kakhulu abazofundisa emabangeni aphansi, okubonakala abantu abaningi bekushalazela lokho,” kusho uMyende. Udalule nokuthi izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme, kumele zibuyekeze indlela ezihlele ngayo izifundo zobuthishela, zingabe zisaxutshwa ngendlela eyenza ukuthi ngisho umuntu esefunde wagogoda kepha kube lukhuni satshe ukuthola umsebenzi ngesicucu sakhe. “Akukhuthazwe izingane ukukhetha imikhakha efanele, nezozisiza ukukwazi ukuziphilisa nokuba wusizo ezidingweni zesikhathi esiphila kusona manje. Akungabi lula ukuthi umuntu avele adumele izifundo okungaziwa ukuthi uma eseziphothulile, uzosebenza kuphi." Uthe nalabo abaqeqeshelwe umkhakha wobuthishela neminye imikhakha, kumele bazi futhi baqonde ukuthi akuwona wonke umuntu ozoba nenhlanhla yokuqashwa, ngakho mhlawumbe kungakuhle ukuqala manje babheke amanye amasu okuphila.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Izimoto zongqongqoshe SIGXEKWA nxa zonke isinqumo soMnyango kaMgcinimafa, sokunyusa imali yokuthenga izimoto zoNgqongqoshe kanjalo nabaPhathiswa beminyango ezifundazweni. Lokhu kulandela ukunyuswa kwemali yokuthenga izimoto, isuke kuR800 000 yaya kuR1.1 million. Umfelandawonye wezinyunyana zabasebenzi iCOSATU neqembu iBOSA, bagxeka lesi sinyathelo sikaMgcinimafa. UMnuz Matthew Parks weCOSATU, ugxeke lesi sinyathelo wathi sifana nokuthifela emehlweni abantulayo. Uthe umnyango kaMgcinimafa utshela abantu ukuthi babophe izifociya kodwa ngakolunye uhlangothi, uthatha izinqumo ezibudedengu ngemali. "UMgcinimafa uhlale ekhala ngokuthi kunenkinga yemali afune ukunyusa intela efakwa uma uthenga impahla iVAT, kodwa unyusela abantu abavele behola kahle imihlomulo. Unyusa intela ekhokhwa abasebenzi ngenxa yokuthi ufuna ukupepenyekisa kahle osopolitiki." Ukhale ngokuthi ayinyuswa nemali eholwa abantu abangasebenzi kuleli, esami ku-R370 ngenyanga. "Le mali ayinyuki kodwa isiza abahlwempu. Sifuna uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa angenelele ngokuchitha lesi sinyathelo." Uthe akukwazi ukulokhu kukhalwa ngemali ekubeni kuhlonyuliswa osopolitiki kuphela. "Incane imali ekhona ezweni ngakho osopolitiki abafunde ukuphila ngalokhu abanakho. Abahambe ngezimoto zohlobo olufanayo ziphinde zakhiwe kuleli." Uthe uhulumeni unezinto ezibaluleke kakhulu okumele uzenze hhayi ukugxila ezintweni ezingathi shu. "Abakhokhi bentela balindele okungcono kuhulumeni hhayi ukuxhashazwa kwemali. Ayichithwe eyokunyuswa kwemali yezimoto zosopolitiki kanti sifuna ukubakhumbuza ukuthi luyeza ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya maduzane." Umholi weBOSA uDkt Mmusi Maimane, usigxekile isinyathelo sikahulumeni sokunyusa imali yezimoto wathi siveza ukuthi uhulumeni uqhelile kubantu. Uthe lesi sinyathelo sivuna ngisho amaphini ongqongqoshe kanjalo nondunankulu bezifundazwe. "Lesi sinyathelo sizocasula abantu, ikakhulu abangasebenzi nababhuqwa yindlala. Imali yomphakathi kumele yenze izidingo ezibalulekile, hhayi ubukhazikhazi." Uthe bazolokhu beqhubekile nokuphenya ibheshu njengoba uNgqongqoshe wezeziMali, uMnuz Enoch Godongwana, edalule eyokunyuka kwemali empendulweni yombuzo obubuzwe yileli qembu ePhalamende.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-LADYSMITH Black Mambazo ivalelisa ngomculo elungwini layo ebese lithathe umhlalaphansi, u-Albert Mazibuko Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu IBISIYIBONA indlela yayo ingwazi yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, uMdletshe Albert Mazibuko, edlule emhlabeni ngeSonto eledule, emuva kokugula njengoba igcizelele kumfowabo isesibhedlela ukuthi ifuna ukufihlwa kuphi ngaphambi kokuthi kuyenele ngakusasa. UMazibuko (77) ushonele esibhedlela esiseThekwini, emuva kokugula isikhashana. Umfowabo u-Abednigo Mazibuko, oke wacula kwiMambazo ngaphambi kokuthatha umhlalaphansi, uthe uMazibuko wazisholo yena ukuthi ufuna ukufihlwa kubo eNtabamhlophe, Estcourt. “Ubengaqali, wakusho futhi kudala ukuthi uma ehamba ufuna ukuya ekhaya. Nakulokhu esegula ngiyombona esibhedlela kuwuMgqibelo, kanti uzohamba ngeSonto, washo wathi ningibeke eceleni kukamfowethu. Niyabona ngapha eduze kwesango. Ngadumala ngoba mina nginethemba lokuthi lo muntu uzophila, wase ekhuluma amagama anzima asinda kangaka. Wathi ningibeke ekhaya impela, ngifuna ukuya ekhaya eduze kukamfowethu. Usethuse kanti usekhuluma okokugcina,” kusho u-Abednigo. U-Abednigo ubekhuluma esithangamini nabezindaba eClermont, izolo, emzini womsunguli weMambazo ongasekho, uJoseph Shabalala. Uthe umfowabo ugule isikhathi esincane kodwa kwamqinisa waze wahlinzwa. Umchaze njengomuntu obenenhlonipho, ehlonipha wonke umuntu kungakhathalele ukuthi mncane noma mdala. Uthe balahlekelwe yisibani ebesegcine nomlando womndeni. Uphethe ngokubonga ukwesekwa wathi bathola izingcingo nemiyalezo evela ngisho phesheya kwezilwandle. URussel Mthembu oyilungu leMambazo eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uthe uMazibuko wayehlale ebagqugquzela ukuthi basebenze kanzima. “Wayethi sisalima, mhla saphumelela umhlabathi uzophenduka igolide, kwenzeka njengoba esho.” ILadysmith Black Mambazo ibuye ngeSonto, eNingizimu Afrika, emuva kokuphothula umjikelezo wase-United States of America (USA). Omunye wabaholi bayo uSibongiseni Shabalala, uthe ngesikhathi bethola izindaba zokudlula kukaMazibuko, babeyohlola imishini yokucula ngaphambi kwekhonsathi yabo kwaba nzima nokuqhubeka. “Kwase kusele imicimbi emine kuya kwemihlanu ukuthi siqede, sibuye. Saqhubeka sayenza sesiyibhekise kuye uMazibuko ngoba sazi ukuthi ukuba ubekhona, ubezosigqugquzela ukuthi asiqhubeke siyibambe kuyona le ndlela abeyihamba.” Uthe uMazibuko, owajoyina iMambazo ngo-1969 nobesethathe umhlalaphansi, ubesadlala indima eqenjini uma lizilolonga aphinde alikhumbuze lapho eliduka khona. “Sifunde okukhulu thina kubaba uMazibuko kusuka sijoyina ngo-1993. Ukuzimisela, ukugcina isikhathi nokuthanda umsebenzi safunda futhi sesiphakathi eMambazweni, nokubambisana nokulalelana ukuthi yikhona okwenza iphupho liphumelele,” kusho uSibongiseni. USibongiseni uveze ukuthi bacele ukulindwa babuye phesheya ukuze bezovalelisa ngaphambi komngcwabo. UMazibuko uzokhonjulwa enkonzweni ezoba seCFCI eBerea, eThekwini ngo-10 ekuseni kusasa. Inkonzo yomngcwabo izoba sesikoleni iMtshezi High, Estcourt ngoMgqibelo ekuseni.
